manifest.name: WordWise

name: WordWise

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Depreciate and hide unsupported native providers which was in old version.
releases.name: 1.4.0-beta.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- LLM generation is now stabler by using Vercel AI SDK.
- Depreciated Azure OpenAI provider.
- Improved Settings Tab UI.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ckt1031/obsidian-wordwise-plugin/compare/1.3.0...1.4.0-beta.1
releases.name: 1.4.0-beta.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- **New Brain Icon**: A unique brain icon now appears in the top right corner of all prompt icons.
- **Improved Modals**: New modals have been introduced for loaded prompts, prompt details, and instruction details. Title colors and padding were also adjusted for better readability.
- **Enhanced Prompt Customization**: Custom prompts in settings now support provider, behavior, and model configurations. File-based prompts have been updated with new icons, behavior settings, and an `omitOriginal` property.
- **Bug Fixes**: Many bugs have been resolved. For a complete list of changes, see the *full changelog*: https://github.com/ckt1031/obsidian-wordwise-plugin/compare/1.2.2...1.3.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Fixed missing inputs in new prompt creation modal in settings tab.
- New view modal for loaded prompts and system instructions.
- Added button to view text generation logs directly from settings tab.
- Adjusted styles for modal titles.
releases.name: 1.3.0-beta4

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Behavior, provider and custom model properties are added to custom prompt in settings tab editor.
- System prompt in file prompts supports relative paths to your system prompt markdown file.
releases.name: 1.3.0-beta3

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Icons now automatically reload when their prompt files are updated.
- The icon for the text generation log has been revamped.
releases.name: 1.3.0-beta2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Fixed new revamped icons are not showing on mobile toolbar properly.
releases.name: 1.3.0-beta1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Updated all prompt icons to use `lucide` and added a `brain-cog` badge at the top right to avoid confusion and icon duplication from other plugins. - Experimentally added default icons for custom prompts using their first letter, with initial style support for English letters. This may cause some display issues with non-English first letters. - Developed a custom solution for managing LLM streaming, eliminating multiple dependencies related to AI provider requests and streaming processes, which helped decrease the overall size of the plugin bundle.
releases.name: 1.3.0-beta0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Streamlined folder path updates in the settings tab  
- Added an option to obfuscate configuration for enhanced security  
- Simplified the message for obfuscated configuration notices  
- Optimized file modification tracking and command management  
- Improved startup speed

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Improvements

- Added "time ago" display in brackets in the text generation logs list, making it easier to see when logs were created
- Updated button layout and text appearances with improved styling
- Fixed exporting text generation logs on mobile by automatically saving to Obsidian config directory

## Technical Fixes

- Improved prompt data updating mechanism using debounce to reduce redundant updates
- Enhanced data persistence by using a more reliable identifier for IndexedDB storage
- Implemented more robust custom provider ID generation using 4-digit nanoid
- Fixed typo in data schema (`orginalText` → `originalText`)
- General stability improvements and code adjustments

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## ✨ New Features

*   **Confirmation Modal:** A pop-up now appears before inserting generated text, allowing you to review and approve the content.
*   **Generation Status:** See a loading indicator on the Obsidian status bar while text is being generated, and click it to interrupt the process (Desktop only).
*   **Streaming Support:** Watch text generate in real-time in a pop-up window as it's received from the API.

## 🚀 Improvements

*   **Simplified Interface:** Switched to a prompt-based system for a more streamlined user experience.
*   **Clearer Model Selection:** Model selection buttons now include text labels for better clarity.
*   **Smoother Settings:** Improved handling of settings, especially when switching providers or refreshing model lists.
*   **Enhanced Error Messages:** Provides more detailed information for issues like API fetch problems.
*   **API Test Button:** The icon clearly indicates success (green) or failure (red) when testing API connections.

## 🐛 Bug Fixes

*   Resolved issues where the custom model and provider fields didn't work correctly in the custom file prompt.
*   Fixed an issue where thinking content was not always removed correctly when copying or inserting generated text.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
*   **Feature**: Added a "Copy All" button to the generation confirmation modal, allowing users to copy the entire generated text, including thinking content.
*   **Improvement**: Enhanced the generation confirmation modal to display the prompt name.
*   **Bug Fix**: Fixed an issue where thinking content was not always removed correctly when copying or inserting generated text.
*   **Improvement**: Added error handling to the generation confirmation modal to display error messages.
releases.name: 1.2.0-beta5

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Removed smooth streaming due to issues with non-English characters during streaming.  
- Fixed a bug where the custom model and provider field didn’t work in the custom file prompt.  
- Simplified the interface by switching to a prompt-based system, making it easier to use.
releases.name: 1.2.0-beta4

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
* Improved text delivery for smoother streaming from API providers.
* Addressed CORS issues with Azure when using libraries.
* Implemented a workaround for Azure provider to function without streaming mode due to limitations with Obsidian's built-in API.
* Enhanced error messages to provide more details, such as API fetch problems.
* Fixed the error icon display on the test button for API connection
releases.name: 1.2.0-beta3

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
1. **Streaming Support**: The plugin now supports streaming views. A pop-up shows you the generation progress, and you can close it to stop. ![Streaming Support Recording](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/0b8d6519-a0f2-47a6-8fe2-57c090b60bd3)
2. **Updated API Testing Button Icon**: The icon now uses red for failure and green for success.
releases.name: 1.2.0-beta1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
*   **Preview Before Inserting:** A confirmation modal now appears before any generated text is added to your note, letting you review and approve the changes.
*   **Generation Status:** A loading indicator on the Obsidian desktop status bar shows when text is being generated, and lets you interrupt the process. (Mobile users, this feature isn't available yet.)
*   **Clearer Model Selection:** We've added text labels to the model selection buttons, making it easier to understand their function.
*   **Smoother Settings Experience:** We've improved how settings are handled, especially when switching providers or refreshing model lists, for a more reliable experience on mobile.
releases.name: 1.2.0-beta0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- **New Providers:** Added Mistral, DeepSeek, GitHub, and X.AI connections.
- **New:** JSON errors now appear in the UI and console, for both PC and mobile, making API testing and debugging easier.
- **Fixes:** Resolved the base URL initialization issue.
- **Adjustments:** Setting tab names and descriptions are now clearer and more readable.
releases.name: 1.1.0-beta2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- **Added**: Introduced a new LM Studio provider.
- **New Feature**: You can now create custom AI providers with multiple APIs, such as Mistral, DeepSeek, and TogetherAI. However, these custom providers must have an OpenAI-compatible API to work.
- **Fixes and Improvements**: Simplified text generation notifications and improved layouts for model temperature and advanced model parameters.

![81321](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/d3c3f77e-39c9-460f-94ed-b9c156a27ad1)
releases.name: 1.1.0-beta1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Version 1.1.0 Initial Beta

- **Added**: New option to remove `<think>...</think>` thinking content from reasoning models such as DeepSeek R1 and Qwen QwQ-32B.  
- **API Updates**: Switched API calls for providers like Ollama, Google Gemini, Cohere, and Anthropic to use the OpenAI-compatible API format for chat completions, replacing their proprietary API structures.  
- **Model Support**: Enhanced model fetching to include support for the Anthropic provider.
releases.name: 1.1.0-beta0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
> Version 1.0.5 was skipped to address bugs found in 1.0.5 and earlier versions.

This small update fixes the `system_instruction` parameter bug in Google's Gemini API. The `v1` and `v1beta` versions now require a specific part format instead of just a string.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
1. Cohere chat API now use `v2`.
2. We have adjusted the message parameters and now going on marking instructions as system message in order to get better results, including Anthropic, Google's Gemini, and Cohere.
3. Some texts in the setting tabs are more clear.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: The penalty options have been removed to avoid compatibility problems with various API providers.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Shorter, more precise, and simpler native prompts.
- All the native prompt instructions are now configured as system messages instead of user messages. This change should make the models follow the instructions more closely.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: This beta version upgrades predefined prompts like "Fix Grammar" and "Improve Writing" with additional instructions to minimize unnecessary context and symbols in the responses.
releases.name: 1.0.0-beta2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.0.0 (Beta 1)

This beta release builds upon the initial beta, addressing an issue with the property field.  The "provider" property, previously required, is now optional.
releases.name: 1.0.0-beta1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.0.0 (Beta 0)

- **Folder-Based Prompts:** This version introduces a more flexible approach to prompt management.  Instead of relying on the plugin's predefined prompts or adding them to `config.json`, you can now create your own prompts directly within your markdown files. This opens up greater possibilities for customization and templating in future updates. ![image](https://obsidian-img.tsun1031.xyz/2024/09/29/7acf79045f30e302f8c5b6d87384c1278b9edf839493f151893e73f7ed08d744.png)
	- Example of a prompt file with properties:
	  ![image](https://obsidian-img.tsun1031.xyz/2024/09/29/d4c79a4a5ab2ea00bd1d0dba0fa08db1cb060c9ac62dcb5b82731f66b912b96b.png)

- **Find Synonyms:** Thanks to a contribution from @lucasadelino, this predefined prompt helps you find the best synonyms for a given word, presented in a clickable menu for easy selection.
    ![image](https://obsidian-img.tsun1031.xyz/2024/09/29/e25dff2425658fbbf2feba36516e39535f565899a1dfe12ff3ede403e34bd403.png)

- **Patches:**  The "custom" provider option now automatically displays the custom base URL field, eliminating the need to enable advanced mode.
releases.name: 1.0.0-beta

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 0.7.4

1. **Added support for Cohere's new `command-r-plus` model**, featuring a 128K context window and enhanced response quality. Learn more: [Introducing Command R+](https://txt.cohere.com/command-r-plus-microsoft-azure/).
2. **Reorganized Perplexity (PPLX) models**: Removed some older models and added new Sonar models.
3. **Integrated Gemini Model API support**: The plugin now uses the model API, enabling compatibility with future Gemini model releases without hard-coding.
4. Fixed an issue where the reset models confirmation was not functioning correctly.
5. **Improved layout for the advanced configuration settings tab**: Settings are now separated into sections for a clearer, more intuitive user experience.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 0.7.3

1. New Cohere model: `command-r`, which is free and outperforms GPT-3.5 Turbo, LLaMA 70B Chat, and Mixtral.
2. New Anthropic's Claude 3.0 Haiku: `claude-3-haiku-20240307`, which is fast and affordable, with a 200K context window. It also outperforms GPT-3.5 Turbo and Gemini 1.0 Pro.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
1. Resolved issue with encoded user prompts
2. Improved debug logging for messages

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
1. Now supports the new Claude 3.0 with `claude-3-opus-20240229` and `claude-3-sonnet-20240229` models.
2. Enhanced prompt clarity by eliminating unnecessary wording.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
1. New Fuzzy Log Search: Utilizing the `Fuse.js` library, our search feature now supports fuzzy logic, allowing for precise and user-friendly search results across your text.

![image](https://obsidian-img.tsun1031.xyz/2024/03/02/e1131b1894974949eb4300b98975f62587e2d524.png)

2. Revamped Settings Layout: The settings page has been restructured into distinct sections including 'Danger Zone,' 'Text Generation Logs,' and 'Prompts.'

3. Text Generation Logs Management:

![image](https://obsidian-img.tsun1031.xyz/2024/03/02/1b9dcaf1331e93296706083403ad0e8f97c64e73.png)

4. Additional Updates:
	1. **LocalForage** now includes vault-specific storage to **prevent different vaults on the same device** and app from sharing storage, as identified in previous tests.
	2. Added an input box for importing settings via data strings.
	3. Improved prompt responses by integrating System Messages when available for enhanced accuracy and quality.
	4. Enhanced prompt optimization to maintain code blocks and avoid encoding.
	5. The README has been updated with detailed information about AI providers.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Fixed QR Code too long error, if it fails to render, just show the copy clipboard button only.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Supports OpenRouter.
- Supports OpenAI Compatible API with custom model list fetching.
- Removed unnecessary encryption for settings exporting.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Fixed API Testing notice model showing `object Object`
- Improved `config.ts` with mapping all default hosts.
- Hide Base URL option as advanced configuration.
- Define the enum in `config.ts` rather than `types.ts`
